case_title: ROBERT SARLES VS. WANDERING EYE PICTURES LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SARLES, ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WANDERING EYE PICTURES LLC LIPMAN, LAWRENCE THIS IS A BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM BY PLAINTIFF WHO SUED "WANDERING EYE PICTURES" AND LAWRENCE LIPMAN, NEITHER OF WHOM IS A PARTY TO THE CONTRACT. CONTRACTING PARTIES ARE BOB SARLES D/B/A RAVIN' FILMS AND TAKING SATAN TO THE MAT, LLC, WHICH IS NOT A NAMED DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 SERVED MAR-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WANDERING EYE PICTURES LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WANDERING EYE PICTURES LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SARLES, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT WANDERING EYE PICTURES LLC LIPMAN, LAWRENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 SERVED MAR-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIPMAN, LAWRENCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-19-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-19-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
